children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Whoever knowingly and intentionally violates, or knowingly and intentionally attempts to violate, shall be fined in accordance with title 18 or imprisoned for not more than 5 years, or both.section 6821 of this title

children.heading: Enhanced penalty for aggravated cases
children.label: b Enhanced penalty for aggravated cases
children.text: Whoever violates, or attempts to violate, while violating another law of the United States or as part of a pattern of any illegal activity involving more than $100,000 in a 12-month period shall be fined twice the amount provided in subsection (b)(3) or (c)(3) (as the case may be) of , imprisoned for not more than 10 years, or both.section 6821 of this titlesection 3571 of title 18
